title: Non-record submission: recurrent 512 L3 6k (8x H100, 224s)
body:
This PR adds a non-record submission under the 10-minute 16MB track.

Summary:
- Model: recurrent shared-loop transformer (MODEL_DIM=512)
- Iterations: 6000
- Hardware: 8x H100
- Runtime: ~224 seconds
- Final val_bpb (int8): 1.6004
- Pre-quant val_bpb: 1.5890

The run satisfies the 10-minute constraint and demonstrates stable convergence using a compact recurrent architecture.

All required artifacts are included:
- train_gpt.py
- train.log
- submission.json
- README.md
